task: find the earliest overlapping meeting slot next Tuesday for the Nairobi and Lisbon teams

steps.name: orchestrator
steps.outputs: Plan: get both teams' working hours, convert them to a common timezone, then find the earliest overlap next Tuesday.

steps.name: web_surfer
steps.outputs: Nairobi is UTC+3 year-round. Lisbon observes daylight time in summer under Western European Summer Time.

steps.name: assistant
steps.outputs: Nairobi 09:00 is 06:00 UTC. Lisbon summer is UTC-1, so that lands at 05:00 Lisbon local.

steps.name: assistant
steps.outputs: Earliest overlap is 05:00 Lisbon / 09:00 Nairobi next Tuesday.
